_comment: OpenLB Lattice Boltzmann (bstep2d example) — 4 MPI ranks throughout.
Checkpoint: bstep2d.cpp:297 calls sLattice.save('bstep2d.checkpoint') every 5000 lattice iters.
At ~2000 iters/phys-second, the first checkpoint fires at ~62.5s (phys-time 2.5s).
bstep2d.checkpoint + bstep2d.checkpoint.iter land in cwd (= run_X/).
Recovery:    bstep2d.cpp:322 reads bstep2d.checkpoint.iter then sLattice.load() resumes.
small-low rationale: kill at 70s — after first checkpoint (~62.5s) but well before completion.
Restart loads checkpoint and continues from saved iteration.

scenarios.name: small-nofail
scenarios._purpose: Golden: error-free baseline, ~140s at 4 ranks. MAX_PHYS_T=2.5.

scenarios.name: small-once
scenarios._purpose: 1 failure injected at 70s — after first checkpoint at ~62.5s.
